# PuCheckboxGroup

## Intent

- checkbox group
- multi-select field

## Prefer When

- Use when multiple checkbox options share one value array or field label.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for a single boolean toggle; use PuCheckbox or PuToggleSwitch.

## Import

```ts
import { PuCheckboxGroup } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```
